dialogos.texto_en: Yesterday, we went shopping,\nbut taking a slow walk like this is nice too.
Yeah, the wind feels great.
Yo, what have you two been up to?
Oh, Futaro-kun.\nAs you can see, we're just taking a leisurely walk.\nWe also hit a dead end with our souvenir search.
It seems so...
What kind of thing would be good I wonder?\nI've been thinking so much\nthat I don't even know anymore.
I thought it would be easier to decide\nif I suggested it.
Maybe we're being too cautious? Maybe it's better\nto just choose something casually.
Hmmm, there are times\nwhen momentum is surprisingly important.
If I had to impulsively decide on something,\nit would be on one of the stuffed animals at the\naquarium shop!
Oh yeah, there were a lot of them.\nThey ranged in size from palm-sized to large ones.
It was like heaven.\nSo many soft and fluffy stuffed animals.
The manta ray stuffed animal was so cute.\nI might want that one.
Definitely! I'm going for the WHALE SHARK!
The whale shark, huh?\nThe biggest one was about the size of Raiha-chan.
Yeah, yeah! That one is my favorite!
Well, buying such a big stuffed animal\nwill just make your room smaller.
Is that so? Isn't it like having\none more family member to greet you?
It depends on how you look at it...
Well then, Uesugi-san. Imagine yourself living alone.
*sigh*
You come home tired, but there's no one there\nwaiting for you in the dark room...
However, if there's a big stuffed animal there\nto greet you, wouldn't that make you feel better?
*sigh*
How about it, Uesugi-san?\nDo you want one now?\nWouldn't it be nice to be greeted by it?
I'm also curious about that.\nFutaro-kun, would you be happy to be greeted by one?
I don't really need anything to greet me.
Whaaa?
Don't make that face.\nThat's just how living alone is.
But if you keep saying that,\nyou'll definitely feel lonely\nonce you start living alone.
And then you'll regret it.
Aah, if only I had bought\nthat big whale shark!\nWhat a fool I was!
That's what you'll say.
There's no need for that.\nDon't act so weird.
Ahaha, I can tell\nthat you're suited for living alone, Futaro-kun.
Well, let's forget about that for now%p-2;――
Just having a stuffed animal\nas a souvenir is good too.
Yay! My idea is being used!\nShould we go see the shop again?
I'd be more surprised than anything.
Why?
I might think someone entered my room.\nIf I were to see it in a dark room,\nit might really look like a human.
Right, it might happen when you least expect it.
Ah, but on the other hand,\nit could also be a security measure, you know?
A giant mysterious shadow in a room\nthat someone thought was empty! A thief panicking\nand running away! Just kidding.
But, I don't even want anyone breaking in in\nthe first place.
Well, let's forget about that for now%p-2;――
Just having a stuffed animal\nas a souvenir is good too.
Yay! My idea is being used!\nShould we go see the shop again?
I guess a greeting would be nice.
I thought so.\nSo, what kind of welcome\nwould make you happy, Futaro-kun?
What do you mean...? Isn't it obvious?
I'm happy as long as Raiha welcomes me.\nI don't really care about what form it takes.
O-oh, that's what you're talking about?
Weeell, I can't be Raiha-chan.\nSo, maybe I'll go with a little sister character...\nNo, that's not quite it.
Ichika?
Ah, it's nothing!
We've got to wean you off of Raiha-chan soon,\ndon't we?
That's right!\nLeave Raiha-chan to me.
Why?
Well, if you and Ichika get married, Uesugi-san,\nthen Raiha-chan would be Ichika's sister,\nso my sister as well.
Y-Yotsuba,\naren't you getting ahead of yourself a bit?!
Well, let's forget about that for now%p-2;――
Just having a stuffed animal\nas a souvenir is good too.
Yay! My idea is being used!\nShould we go see the shop again?
Wait a minute Yotsuba, \nwe're just talking it about being\na potential option at the moment.
I feel like the number of options\nhas increased since yesterday...
Having a wide range of choices\nis good, isn't it?
Indeed, if we've come this far so, we might as well\nthink hard about it until the very end. If we choose\nsomething like that, anything should be fine.
You're right, Uesugi-san.
That's right.\nIt'd be a waste to narrow down the possibilities\nuntil something has been completely decided.
So let's just keep it in the back of our minds\nand continue our walk.
Yes.
